title: Savory Juicy Egyptian Chicken Bake
description: A comforting and flavorful Egyptian-inspired dish perfect for a sick day, featuring tender chicken, caramelized shallots, and aromatic spices. This halal-friendly recipe is easy to make and serves 4-6 people.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
In a large baking dish, arrange the sliced shallots in an even layer.
Add the chicken on top of the shallots.
Pour the chicken broth over the chicken and shallots.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the shallots are caramelized.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
